dashboard.title: Portfolio Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back! Here's what's happening today.

login.title: Invest Planner
login.subtitle: Plan Your Wealth. Build Your Future.
login.forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
login.reset_email_sent: If the email is registered, a reset link has been sent.
login.reset_failed: Reset failed. The link may be expired.
login.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
login.register_subtitle: Sign up to start planning your investments
login.consent_checkbox: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
login.consent_dialog_body: Welcome to Invest Planner! By creating an account or signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. We collect your username, optionally your email address, and transaction details solely to operate your personal portfolio tracker. We will never sell your data or share it with unauthorized third parties.
login.consent_dialog_tos_body: Invest Planner provides premium financial planning, portfolio tracking, and visual transaction logging tools. By using our platform, you agree to protect your credentials, avoid executing security penetration testing or automated scraping without written authorization, and acknowledge that the tracker is for educational and informational tracking purposes only.
login.consent_dialog_privacy_body: Your privacy is extremely critical to us. We store your account parameters and financial transaction history securely in our backend database. All portfolios, watchlists, and profile records are strictly confidential and fully isolated to your authenticated account ID. We strictly do not share, sell, or distribute your trade or contact metadata to third-party organizations.
login.google_tos_message: By clicking 'Continue with Google', you agree to our <0>Terms of Service</0> and <1>Privacy Policy</1>.
login.link_confirm_question: Would you like to link your Google account to this profile so you can log in with Google in the future? If you decline, this login attempt will be cancelled.
login.guest_mode: Guest Mode / ผู้เยี่ยมชม

watchlist.subtitle: Keep track of your favorite symbols and stay updated.
watchlist.duplicate: This asset is already in your watchlist.

settings.title: Personalization
settings.set_password_desc: Create a password so you can log in with your username or email without needing Google.
settings.change_password_desc: Ensure your account is secure using a long, random password.
settings.unlink_body: You are about to remove your Google sign-in from this account.
settings.unlink_warning: You do not have a local password set. You must set one first, otherwise you will be locked out!
settings.unlink_after: After unlinking, you can log in using your username and password.
settings.delete_account_desc: Permanently erase your account and all portfolio data after a 14-day grace period.
settings.delete_scheduled: Scheduled for deletion on {{date}}. {{days}} days remaining.
settings.request_delete_warning: This action will schedule your account for permanent deletion in 14 days.
settings.request_delete_body: All your personal information, portfolio transactions, wallets, and watchlists will be permanently erased. Your account ID will be kept as an anonymous placeholder.
settings.request_delete_note: You can cancel this request any time during the 14-day window. After that, there is no way to recover your data.
settings.guest_banner_title: Guest Mode (ผู้เยี่ยมชม)
settings.guest_banner_body: Your portfolios, cash transactions, and trade logs are stored locally in your browser. Register an account or Link Google to sync and back up all your guest portfolios to the cloud!

confirm.logout_message: Are you sure you want to log out of Invest Planner?

transaction.insufficient_cash_instruction: Please go to Dashboard > Manage to navigate and add more Buying Power in your pocket before buying.

portfolio.limit_reached: You have reached the limit of 10 portfolios.
